items.text: Better to clean every day. Why let so much dirt to accumulate??
Can you please also do a video on cleaning clay water bottle? It is very difficult due to small mouth and not allowed to use detergent.

I sincerely advise everyone to stop using all kinds of plastic bottles, use glass or steel ones.🙏🙏You have no idea how bad these microplastics are. The worst part is that...Once they get into your body...it's impossible to remove them....No matter what you do.....And moreover, they can get accumulated in your brain.Plss avoid and boycott all kinds of plastic items 🙏🙏

People this is not good & hygienic. 1.JUST rinse the bottle with water.2. Remove the water.3. As the bottle is wet add 2 table spoon full ROCK SALK & shake well.4. Leave it for 5 mts.5. After 5 mts add little water & RINSE WELL.6. Then wash it with ordinary water well. This removes all the stain & other bacteria etc.7. Soap/brush of any type is not required. They only infecttge bottle again. 8. Our whole family does this since generations.
